div1.entryFree: Bout, subst., a turn, a pass (in fencing): the gentleman will, for his honour's sake, have one b. with you, Tw. III, 4, 337. make your --s more violent, Hml. IV, 7, 159. I'll play this b. first, V, 2, 295. Menacingly: I'll have a b. with thee, H6A I, 5, 4. III, 2, 56. Used of dancing: ladies . . . . will have a b. with you, Rom. I, 5, 19 (only in the spurious Q1; the rest of O. Edd. walk about).
